external_references.description: David Ketler. (2026, March 30). Stryker Cyber-Attack: What we Know so Far About the Remote Wipe Attack. Retrieved April 20, 2026.

DOJ/FBI. (2026, March 19). Case 1:26-mj-00683-CDA: Affidavit in Support of Seizure Warrant: In the Matter of the Seizure of Domain Names Justicehomeland[.]org; karmabelow80[.]org; handala-hack[.]to; and handala-redwatned[.]to. Retrieved April 20, 2026.

objects.description: [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has conducted data exfiltration and posted stolen information on data leak sites for the purposes of financial and political extortion.(Citation: SPECOPS Outpost24 Handala Hack Stryker March 2026)(Citation: DOJ FBI Handala Hack March 2026) [VOID MANTICORE](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1055) has also sold stolen data to prospective buyers for cryptocurrency.(Citation: DOJ FBI Handala Hack March 2026)
